_comment: Canonical AI tool result shapes returned by VSE tool executor functions. These are the typed result models that flow through the operator → tool_executor → agent stack. Authority: VSE. Consumers: VSE (Python, app/models/tool_results.py). All error type values cross-reference shared/constants/status.json command.error.type. All status values cross-reference shared/constants/status.json execution.status.
_comment.scope: These models are VSE-internal result shapes — they are NOT pub/sub wire payloads. The pub/sub wire payloads (the shapes VSA publishes) are defined in wire/result_payloads.json. The models here are the enriched, post-processed results that tool_executor.py returns to the agent after translating the wire payload.

operation_error_base._description: Common error fields inherited by all tool result models. Every tool result includes these fields.

error_type.description: Machine-readable error classification. See shared/constants/status.json command.error.type.

execution_id.description: Execution identifier from the originating operator command

available_operators.description: Number of bound operators at time of failure. Present when error is operator-availability-related.

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout value that was in effect. Present when error_type is operation.timeout.

status.description: Execution status when failure is status-driven (e.g. timeout). See shared/constants/status.json execution.status.

file_edit_result._description: Result returned by file_create_on_operator, file_write_on_operator, file_read_on_operator, and file_update_on_operator tool calls. Extends operation_error_base.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the target file

operation.description: File operation performed. See shared/constants/status.json file.operation.

content.description: File content returned for read operations

backup_path.description: Path to backup file when create_backup was true

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the file operation

approved.description: Whether the operation received user approval

blocking_issues.description: List of issues that blocked the operation (e.g. system file, dirty repo)

risk_analysis.description: Risk analysis result. Present when file operation risk analysis was performed.

file_operation_risk_analysis._description: Risk analysis result for file operations. Embedded in file_edit_result.

risk_level.description: Classified risk level. See shared/constants/status.json risk.level.

is_system_file.description: Whether the target path is a system file

safe_to_proceed.description: Whether the operation is safe to proceed

approval_prompt.description: Human-readable prompt shown to the user for approval

port_check_tool_result._description: Result returned by the check_port_status tool call. Extends operation_error_base.

fs_list_tool_result._description: Result returned by the list_files_and_directories_with_detailed_metadata tool call. Extends operation_error_base.

path.description: Resolved absolute path that was listed

entries.description: Directory entries. See wire/result_payloads.json fs_list_result entries items for the per-entry shape.

truncated.description: True if results were capped at max_entries

fs_read_tool_result._description: Result returned by file_read_on_operator when data is returned directly (not stored locally). Extends operation_error_base.

path.description: Absolute path of the file read

fetch_logs_tool_result._description: Result returned by the fetch_execution_output tool call. Contains stored command output retrieved from the operator local vault. Extends operation_error_base.

command.description: Original command string whose output was fetched

exit_code.description: Exit code of the original command

timestamp.description: When the original command was executed

audit_session_metadata._description: WebSession metadata embedded in fetch_history_tool_result. Typed model for the session object returned by fetch_session_history. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json fetch_history_result.session.

user_identity.description: Identity of the user who owns the session

fs_list_entry._description: A single directory entry returned by an fs_list operation. Items in fs_list_tool_result.entries. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json fs_list_result entries items.

mode.description: Permission mode as octal string e.g. 0755

audit_file_mutation._description: A single file mutation record embedded in an AuditEvent. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json fetch_history_result events file_mutations items.

audit_event._description: A single audit event record returned by fetch_session_history. Items in fetch_history_tool_result.events. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json fetch_history_result events items.

file_mutations.description: File mutations linked to this event.

file_history_entry._description: A single commit history entry returned by fetch_file_history. Items in fetch_file_history_tool_result.history. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json fetch_file_history_result history items.

file_edit_pending_result._description: Typed result for file_edit operations. VSE-internal only — never crosses a wire boundary.

content.description: File content returned for read operations

file_diff_entry._description: Single file diff record from the operator ledger. Used as items in fetch_file_diff_tool_result and as the diff field in fetch_file_diff_tool_result. Canonical wire shape: wire/result_payloads.json file_diff_entry.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the mutated file

diff_content.description: Full diff content. May be absent when not requested.

diff_size.description: Size of diff content in bytes

web_session_id.description: Audit session that produced this mutation

token_usage._description: Token usage reported by the LLM for a streaming response. Embedded in StreamChunkData and ConversationMessageMetadata.

estimated.description: True when the count is estimated rather than exact

error.description: Error message if token counting failed

fetch_history_tool_result._description: Result returned by the fetch_session_history tool call. Contains audit session history from the operator local vault. Extends operation_error_base.

web_session.description: WebSession metadata. Typed as AuditSessionMetadata. See audit_session_metadata for the shape.

events.description: Audit events. See wire/result_payloads.json fetch_history_result events items for the per-event shape.

fetch_file_history_tool_result._description: Result returned by the fetch_file_history tool call. Contains ledger commit history for a file. Extends operation_error_base.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file queried

history.description: Commit history entries. See wire/result_payloads.json fetch_file_history_result history items for the per-entry shape.

restore_file_tool_result._description: Result returned by the restore_file tool call. Extends operation_error_base.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the restored file

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash the file was restored to

fetch_file_diff_tool_result._description: Result returned by the fetch_file_diff tool call. Extends operation_error_base.

diff.description: Single diff entry when fetching by diff_id. Typed as FileDiffEntry.

diffs.description: Multiple diff entries when fetching by web_session_id. Items are FileDiffEntry.

intent_permission_result._description: Result returned by grant_intent_permission and revoke_intent_permission tool calls. Extends operation_error_base.

approved.description: Whether the user approved the intent request

intent_name.description: Single intent name or comma-separated list that was requested

all_intents.description: Expanded list of all intents (including dependencies) that were processed

operation_context.description: High-level operation context shown to the user during approval

feedback.description: True when the user provided feedback/clarification rather than approve/deny

invalid_intents.description: Intents that were not recognized as valid

successful_intents.description: Intents that were successfully granted or revoked

failed_intents.description: Intents that failed during IAM policy attachment/detachment

stderr.description: Stderr from the IAM attach/detach command if run

output.description: Stdout from the IAM attach/detach command if run

exit_code.description: Exit code from the IAM attach/detach command if run

pending_command.description: AWS CLI command that was executed automatically after approval

timestamp.description: When the permission grant/revoke was processed

revoked_intents.description: Intents that were successfully revoked (revoke_intent_permission only)

web_search_result_item._description: A single result item from the Google Custom Search API. Embedded as items in search_web_result.results.

title.description: Page title returned by the search API

link.description: Canonical URL of the search result

snippet.description: Short text excerpt from the page

search_web_result._description: Result returned by the search_web tool call. VSE-only: executed directly against Google Custom Search API, never crosses a VSA wire boundary. Extends operation_error_base.

query.description: The search query that was submitted

results.description: Search result items from Google Custom Search API. Items are WebSearchResultItem.

total_results.description: Total result count string from Google searchInformation.totalResults

command_risk_analysis._description: Risk analysis result for shell commands. Produced by the AI assistant model before command dispatch.

risk_level.description: Classified risk level. See shared/constants/status.json risk.level.

error_analysis_result._description: Error analysis result produced by the AI assistant model after a command fails. Drives auto-fix vs escalation decision.

can_auto_fix.description: Whether the error can be automatically fixed by re-running a corrected command

suggested_command.description: Exact command to fix the issue

should_escalate.description: Whether to escalate to human intervention

reasoning.description: Explanation of the auto-fix vs escalate decision

user_message.description: Brief message to show the user
